testcase.name: loginExcelTest

failure.message: org.apache.poi.EmptyFileException: The supplied file was empty (zero bytes long)

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: org.apache.poi.EmptyFileException: The supplied file was empty (zero bytes long) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) Caused by: org.apache.poi.EmptyFileException: The supplied file was empty (zero bytes long) at org.apache.poi.util.IOUtils.peekFirstNBytes(IOUtils.java:111) at org.apache.poi.poifs.filesystem.FileMagic.valueOf(FileMagic.java:206) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.verifyZipHeader(ZipHelper.java:144) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.openZipFile(ZipHelper.java:215) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.<init>(ZipPackage.java:188) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:285) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:192) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:334) at com.utility.ExcelUtility.readExcelFile(ExcelUtility.java:27) at com.ui.loginDataProvider.LoginDataProvider.excelLoginDataProvider(LoginDataProvider.java:54) ... 25 more ...
